headline: How The PTC (PTC) Investment Narrative Is Shifting After Recent Divestitures And Target Resets
summary: PTC’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$195.00 to about US$190.53, a modest adjustment that reflects updated assumptions after recent divestitures. Recent Street commentary, including an Overweight rating tied to a US$180 price target on the bullish side and US$15 to US$40 target cuts from more cautious firms, shows how differently analysts are reading the same reset. As you read on, you will see what is driving these shifts and how to follow the evolving narrative around PTC. Stay...
